description: A dominant performance by FooW Clan on the AOK DOTA V 2.03 map. Superior flanking strategies and coordinated unit pushes led to a decisive victory. PTG put up a strong defense in the early game but FooW's mid-game aggression proved unstoppable.
battleNotes: Though fight we were lossing at start but with proper strategy we executed a perfect pincer attack in the final engagement and won. BaD_Ass leader did greate job by Attacking Directly

description: An intense high-population battle on the legendary Hitler 1000 Pop map. Shadow Wolves brought their best roster but FooW's superior macro management and resource control sealed the victory.
battleNotes: Massive late-game battle with over 500 units clashing simultaneously. NØ_ØNE's siege coordination was the turning point.

description: A hard-fought battle on Blood Maps that ultimately went to Dark Knights. FooW suffered from an early rush that disrupted the planned economy build. Despite a valiant comeback attempt, the damage was too severe to recover from.
battleNotes: Dark Knights executed a well-timed feudal rush. Lessons learned on early scouting and defense positioning. Rematch scheduled.

description: An evenly matched showdown on CBA Heroes Turbo. Both clans traded blows throughout the entire game with neither side able to establish a decisive advantage. The match ended in a mutual agreement to draw after an extended stalemate.
battleNotes: One of the longest matches in recent FooW history. Both clans showed incredible resilience. A rematch is highly anticipated by both sides.

description: FooW's expertise on Vampire Recursion was on full display. The team's deep knowledge of the custom map mechanics gave them a significant edge. Viper Squad struggled to adapt to the unique gameplay elements.
battleNotes: Diblo's mastery of the vampire mechanics was the deciding factor. A clinic on how to play Vampire Recursion at the highest level.
